description: Small fragment of a legal document in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100–38). Involves Abū Sulaymān Dāʾūd, [...] al-ʿAdanī "his partner in the wakāla," and trade in Yemen. See T-S AS 148.50 + T-S NS 292.84 (PGPID 16405) and the list of potentially related shelfmarks there.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
